title: Correctly handle data types on nets

features.name: wire with class type
features.description: Code should include a net (wire) declaration with a class type, which is invalid in SV and should cause an error

features.name: wire with dynamic array type
features.description: Code should include a net (wire) declaration with a dynamic array type, which is invalid for nets and should cause an error

features.name: wire with queue type
features.description: Code should include a net (wire) declaration with a queue type ($), which is invalid for nets and should cause an error

features.name: wire with string type
features.description: Code should include a net (wire) declaration with a string type, which is invalid for nets and should cause an error

features.name: module input port with reg type
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog module input port declared with reg type (input reg a), which is allowed in SV but not in Verilog

features.name: module inout port with reg type
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog module inout port declared with reg type (inout reg a), which is allowed in SV but not in Verilog
